bic_model.description: Backbase Intelligence Credits (BICs) — a normalised unit of AI work. Each agent action has a defined BIC weight based on complexity.

weight_scale.0.1: Deterministic workflow step (rule-based routing, status update)
weight_scale.0.2: Simple agent action (data lookup, field extraction)
weight_scale.0.5: Agent reasoning + tool call (NBA calculation, compliance check)
weight_scale.2.0: Multi-step agent reasoning (credit assessment, risk scoring)
weight_scale.3.0: Multi-step agent plan (review briefing, case analysis)
weight_scale.5.0: Complex orchestrated workflow (meeting summarisation, periodic review)

if_domain_base.description: Intelligence Fabric Domain Base — covers Agent Factory, AI gateway, orchestration, guardrails, prompt management, telemetry.

entry.label: Entry Domain
entry.includes: Agent Factory access, AI gateway, basic orchestration, compliance guardrails

standard.label: Standard Domain
standard.includes: Entry + advanced model routing, multi-model support, enhanced observability

enterprise.label: Enterprise Domain
enterprise.includes: Standard + dedicated infrastructure, custom model hosting, SLA guarantees

bic_blocks.description: Pre-purchased BIC blocks. First block priced at premium; additional blocks at standard rate.
bic_blocks.notes: BIC blocks are annual. Unused BICs do not roll over. Overage billed at the additional block rate pro-rated.

compute_passthrough.description: Raw LLM inference costs passed through to the bank with an orchestration margin.
compute_passthrough.notes: Rates as of Q1 2026. LLM costs decline 30-50% annually — Backbase retains savings as expanding margin.

build_it_yourself_benchmarks.description: Reference costs for banks building equivalent AI capabilities internally. Used as value anchor in three-layer pricing transparency.
build_it_yourself_benchmarks.notes: Conservative estimates. Does not include compliance certification, model fine-tuning, or ongoing MLOps costs.

volume_discount_curves.description: BIC block volume discounts based on total annual commitment.

margin_protection.description: Minimum margin floors to protect Backbase economics at all scale points.
margin_protection.notes: Platform price must be at least 15x raw compute cost. Gross margin must not drop below 60%.
